product_information.product_name: Aquafresh White Renew Deep Clean Tandpasta 75 ML

inferred_information.raw_ingredients: Aqua, Sorbitol, Hydrated Silica, Glycerin, Pentasodium Triphosphate, PEG-6, Alumina, Sodium Lauryl Sulfate, Aroma, PVP, Xanthan Gum, Menthol, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Carrageenan, Sodium Fluoride, Sodium Saccharin, Sodium Hydroxide, Mentha Piperita Oil, Carvone, Eucalyptus Globulus Oil, Mentha Viridis Leaf Oil, Limonene, Anethole, CI 73360, CI 74160, CI 74260. Bevat natriumfluoride (1450 ppm F⁻)
inferred_information.legal_grade:
Up to 3x more effective stain removal with advanced cleaning foam to target and reverse stains,Aquafresh White Renew Deep Clean is a combination of clinically proven whitening ingredients which reverses stains and helps to protect your teeth's natural whiteness,1 LIFTS DEEP STAINS from the tooth surface
2 GENTLY POLISHES TEETH for a shiny appearance
3 PREVENTS NEW STAINS to help keep teeth white
